description: Mid-top chukka boots for the adolescent style maven from enroute's teen collection. boys can wear this with jeans and a crisp shirt for a semi-formal vibe. Even girls can use this shoe to finish off a borrowed-from-the-boys look!UpperFabric upper with a nubuck toe boxCentral lace upsPadded tongueMid-top stylingReinforced overlay at the heel collarMidsoleTough rubber outsoleOutsoleDurable TPU outsole with tyre tread patterned groovesShoe careClean the upper using a suede brushDo not store in direct sunlight
